description: Example generic author-input benchmark package that carries direct author guidance plus optional source notes into the multi-agent manuscript system without depending on PaperWritingBench-specific field names.
notes: This package exercises a simpler external package shape built around direct author inputs.
The generic author-input adapter requires author_inputs.topic instead of deriving the topic from idea-summary materials.

cases.description: A generic author-input package should be able to drive the manuscript system directly from author_inputs while still carrying supporting context in source materials.

checks.label: topic
checks.actual: Direct author input benchmark for therapeutic response
checks.expected: Direct author input benchmark for therapeutic response

checks.label: results_section_note_contains
checks.actual: Lead the Results with the strongest treatment-response separation.

checks.label: claim_response_kinetics_claim_packet_note_contains
checks.actual: Open the first results subsection with this response-divergence claim.

checks.label: claim_response_kinetics_draft_subsection_note_contains
checks.actual: Open the first results subsection with this response-divergence claim.

source_materials.brief: This package uses direct author inputs instead of benchmark-specific pre-writing fields.

cases.description: The generic adapter should preserve the same unknown-claim guardrail behavior when direct author inputs point to a non-existent claim id.

checks.label: expected_error_contains
checks.actual: author_content_inputs.json contains unknown claim_ids: claim_not_in_repo. Decide whether to add or replace the underlying fact-sheet/display-item claim before generating drafts.

metrics.error_message: author_content_inputs.json contains unknown claim_ids: claim_not_in_repo. Decide whether to add or replace the underlying fact-sheet/display-item claim before generating drafts.

source_materials.brief: This negative case checks that direct author inputs still honor the tracked claim-id guardrail.
